notes: Multi-day Ralphy Mode 3 autonomous migration campaign (3 calendar days, 4 context continuations). Migrated ~519 HTML presentation slides from iframe rendering to harness/web-component system across ~14 decks. Custom toolchain: migrate-type-a.js, migrate-type-b.js, pipeline.js (Playwright pixel-diff verification with quality tiers). Key discoveries: CSS token injection gap (addStyleTag fix), CORS blocker forcing approach change, viewport-lock architectural limitation. Voice-transcribed prompts with 3 frustration/correction episodes. Closing architectural debate: harness injection vs Web Components/Shadow DOM. Tools: Bash x265, Edit x102, Read x47, Agent x17. Used git worktrees for parallel application versions. Highest observed context exhaustion count (4). Skills: ralphy (Mode 2 then 3), plus 4 additional invocations.
